summary: Plan mode only. #50093 remains the live canonical issue for WhatsApp missed-message backfill after reconnection. #76175 and #80642 are related open fix PRs in the same canonical family, but neither is merge-ready: both are dirty and blocked on real behavior proof, while #76175 also has dependency-guard failures and broader config/schema/docs surface. No closures, labels, comments, merges, or fix PRs are planned.
